# .github

## Purpose
GitHub-managed configuration. Currently only contains the Actions
workflows directory.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflows for build / scan / attest / publish (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`). |
